ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee handling the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "shipper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipper responsible for the order delivery */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipper_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipper_id") REFERENCES shippers ("shipper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Job role of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shippers" (
  "shipper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipper */,
  "shipper_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping company */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the shipping company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shipping company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the shipping company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the shipping company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping company's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the shipping company is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for shipping */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for shipping */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for shipping */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for shipping */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
